completed_tasks.name: Task 2: Phase 18 config keys + ContextCompressor setters

decisions.decision: Apply adaptive shift BEFORE ContextCompressor::compress, check orphan invariant AFTER
decisions.rationale: Keeps pairs intact through pruning; invariant catches any remaining break and returns ContextError::OrphanedToolPair per T-18-02
Plan 18-02 needs configurable D-15 threshold; defers Config wiring to Plan 18-06

decisions.decision: PromptBuilder uses with_system_message(impl Into<String>) setter, not a Config reference
decisions.rationale: PromptBuilder does not hold Config today; callers pass config.agent.system_message.clone() at build time. Matches existing with_provider / with_context_length pattern

decisions.decision: ChatMessage.role is Role enum (System/User/Assistant/Tool), not String
decisions.rationale: 18-02 plan pseudocode used string comparison; tool_pair module uses Role variants instead. Note for 18-03 executor: use Role::* rather than role string

decisions.decision: AgentConfig kept legacy context_compression: f64 field; added new compression_threshold: f32 alongside
decisions.rationale: Preserve backward compat with existing Phase 17 configs; Plan 18-06 will pick which field agent_loop reads

next_action: Resume with /gsd-execute-phase 18 --wave 3 to run Plans 18-03 (SummarizingEngine) and 18-04 (ContextPreCompress hook) in parallel. Both depend only on 18-01 / 18-02 which are complete.
context_notes: Phase 18 Wave 1 and Wave 2 are complete (4 plans committed this session). Wave 3 has 2 parallel plans. ChatMessage uses Role enum not strings — correct the 18-02 plan pseudocode mental model when reading 18-03. ContextCompressor::compute_protect_start is the canonical boundary-math helper. LocalPruningEngine now runs adaptive-shift + orphan-invariant; engines added later should follow the same pattern. STATE.md still says phase 17 executing — update to 18 before or during next execute-phase run. Pre-existing clippy errors unrelated to Phase 18 exist in ProviderConfig (derivable_impls) and memory_store (manual_is_multiple_of); Phase 18 code itself is clippy-clean.
